creator: sunpoet@FreeBSD.org
text:
I cannot reproduce the download problem you encoutered. Your log shows
that you're using wget to download distfiles. Please use default fetch
(/usr/bin/fetch) instead. Thanks.

A good download would be as follows:

# rm /usr/ports/distfiles/Droid*
# cd /usr/ports/x11-fonts/droid-fonts-ttf/
# make fetch
=> DroidSans-Bold.ttf doesn't seem to exist in /usr/ports/distfiles/.
=> Attempting to fetch http://android.git.kernel.org/?p=platform/frameworks/base.git;a=blob_plain;f=data/fonts/DroidSans-Bold.ttf
DroidSans-Bold.ttf                            100% of  189 kB   37 kBps
=> DroidSans.ttf doesn't seem to exist in /usr/ports/distfiles/.
